Aggregated execute batches: completed 3/3.
Batch 1: Executed batch 1 tasks T1-T3 in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app`. Added ordered multi-generation shot creation support, verified `VideoGenerationModal` only relies on app-wide providers/hooks, created a shared portal-based `SelectionContextMenu`, ran the targeted vitest suite successfully, and checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/feature-right-click-context-20260404-0347/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Executed batch 2 tasks T4-T5. Wired the shared selection context menu into the gallery selection flow, added timeline Create Shot / Generate Video actions with generation-asset gating and ordered insertion, verified the touched gallery and timeline modules with targeted vitest runs, and checkpointed batch progress to `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/feature-right-click-context-20260404-0347/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Executed batch 3 verification for T6. The full Vitest suite completed with pre-existing unrelated failures, the feature-specific gallery/shotCreation/timeline suites passed cleanly, a throwaway smoke test confirmed `createShotWithGenerationsPath` inserts generations sequentially and was deleted afterward, and batch progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/feature-right-click-context-20260404-0347/execution_batch_3.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `generationIds?: string[]` to `CreateShotOptions`, introduced `CreateShotWithGenerationsPathInput`, exported `insertAutoPositionedShotGeneration`, and added `createShotWithGenerationsPath()` that creates the shot first and then inserts each generation with an awaited `for...of` loop before invalidating shot-related caches. `useCreateShotAction` now routes ordered multi-generation requests to that path while still deriving the shot name through the existing `generateShotName()` call site in `useShotCreation`. Verified with `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts src/shared/components/SelectionContextMenu.test.tsx`.

Inspected `VideoGenerationModal.tsx`, `useVideoGenerationModalController.ts`, `useShotNavigation.ts`, `useShotSettings.ts`, `useShotImages.ts`, and `AppProviders.tsx`. The modal/controller use QueryClient, ProjectContext, CurrentShotContext, router navigation, shared shot/settings queries, and shared invalidation hooks, all of which are provided app-wide. No travel-tool-only provider dependency was found, so no wrapper changes were required in this batch.

Added `SelectionContextMenu` as a shared `createPortal(..., document.body)` menu with fixed-position rendering, click-away dismissal, Escape dismissal, and token-based popover styling. The component exposes `Create Shot` and `Generate Video` actions with lucide icons and disables actions while `isCreating` is true. Verified with a dedicated RTL test plus the shared shotCreation suite via `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts src/shared/components/SelectionContextMenu.test.tsx`.

Threaded `onContextMenu` through the gallery item prop chain into `GenerationsPaneGallery`, then added a selection-driven context menu flow there. Right-click now single-selects an unselected gallery item first, uses `Array.from(gallerySelectionMap.values()).map(entry => entry.generationId)` to preserve selection order, calls `createShot({ generationIds })`, clears gallery selection only after a successful shot creation, and opens `VideoGenerationModal` with the newly created `Shot` for Generate Video. Verified with `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts`.

Extended the existing `ClipAction` portal menu with Create Shot / Generate Video entries while leaving the delete, split, mute, stale-variant, and dismiss actions intact. Timeline shot creation now resolves selected clips against `data.registry.assets`, hides the new actions whenever any selected clip lacks a `generationId`, sorts selected clips by `(trackIndex, action.start)` before extracting generation IDs, and opens the shared `VideoGenerationModal` from `TimelineEditor` with the created `Shot`. Verified with `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts`.

Ran the full Vitest suite with `npx vitest run`; it completed in 226.13s with 807 passing files and 26 failing suites / 53 failing tests, all outside the gallery/timeline shot-context-menu feature. Verified the touched areas separately with `npx vitest run src/features/gallery src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationAction.test.ts src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationPaths.test.ts src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCacheUpdate.test.ts src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationEffects.test.ts src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor`, which passed cleanly (16 files / 63 tests). Added a throwaway smoke test that imported `createShotWithGenerationsPath`, mocked insertions, proved the second and third inserts did not start until the prior promise resolved, ran it successfully, then deleted the file. Reviewed the gallery/timeline diff and confirmed the context-menu changes are additive: existing gallery selection behavior, drag-and-drop hooks, and timeline menu actions were not removed or regressed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `createShotWithGenerationsPath()` awaits `insertAutoPositionedShotGeneration()` inside a `for...of` loop, and the new branch still uses the existing `generateShotName()` path because `useCreateShotAction` computes `shotName` from `name || generateShotName()` before dispatch.

Confirmed the modal/controller do not depend on travel-tool-only providers such as ShotEditorContext. The controller only reaches shared app providers/hooks: ProjectContext, QueryClient, CurrentShotContext via `useShotNavigation`, router navigation, shared shot/settings hooks, and invalidation.

Confirmed `SelectionContextMenu` renders through `createPortal(..., document.body)`, uses fixed positioning, closes on click-away and Escape, and is styled with `bg-popover`, `text-popover-foreground`, `border`, `rounded-md`, and `shadow-md`.

Confirmed the gallery handler single-selects an unselected right-click target first, derives ordered `generationIds` from `gallerySelectionMap` insertion order, clears gallery selection after successful shot creation, and opens `VideoGenerationModal` with the created `Shot` in the Generate Video path.

Confirmed the timeline menu hides Create Shot / Generate Video when any selected clip resolves to no `generationId`, sorts selected clips by `(trackIndex, action.start)` before creating the shot, and leaves the existing delete, split, mute, and stale-variant actions unchanged.

Confirmed the relevant tests pass: `src/features/gallery` test coverage, `src/shared/components/MediaGalleryItem.behavior.test.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationAction.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationPaths.test.ts`, related shotCreation tests, and `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx` / `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts`. The touched mocks already accommodate the new `onContextMenu` path, and no additional mock fixes were needed during this verification pass.
